vocab.meaning: mức giá cao (thường đi đôi với thương hiệu lớn)
vocab.example: Although iconic brands come with a premium price tag, the durability they offer often justifies the initial investment.

vocab.meaning: sự hỗ trợ về mặt chỉnh hình (tốt cho cấu trúc chân)
vocab.example: I gravitate towards reputable footwear labels because they prioritize orthopedic support, which is essential for long-term foot health.

vocab.meaning: phiên bản phát hành độc quyền/giới hạn
vocab.example: I'm not the type of person who waits in line for an exclusive release just to keep up with the latest fashion trends.

vocab.meaning: giá trị thương hiệu (niềm tin và sự công nhận từ khách hàng)
vocab.example: Established companies rely on their brand equity to assure customers of the high quality and ethics of their manufacturing process.
The market is saturated with counterfeit goods, which is why I prefer buying directly from official brand outlets.

vocab.meaning: đảm bảo cho, cam đoan về (chất lượng)
vocab.example: Many professional athletes vouch for the performance-enhancing features of specialized high-end basketball shoes.

vocab.meaning: hợp thời trang, dẫn đầu xu hướng
vocab.example: Buying from world-renowned designers allows me to maintain a fashion-forward image in professional settings.

vocab.meaning: thiết kế tối ưu hóa sự vận động và thoải mái
vocab.example: Famous sport brands often feature ergo-dynamic designs that minimize the risk of injury during high-intensity workouts.

vocab.meaning: sự tiêu dùng phô trương (mua đồ hiệu để khoe khoang)
vocab.example: Some critics argue that buying branded footwear is merely an act of conspicuous consumption to display one's wealth.

vocab.meaning: quy trình kiểm soát chất lượng nghiêm ngặt
vocab.example: I trust major brands because they implement rigorous quality control, ensuring that every pair is free from defects.
